value: Build Wealth.|Upgrade Your Mindset. Design Your Life of Freedom.
Findas Academy is a learning community built to help you manage money wisely build long-term wealth and grow with like-minded individuals committed to continuous improvement.
Hello I am Samir Machawe founder of Findas Academy and a Financial Freedom Coach with more than two decades of experience helping individuals build wealth and financial clarity.
Most people struggle with money not because they lack intelligence but because no one teaches them how money actually works.
My mission is simple to help people move from survival mode to freedom mode.
